Flow.description: 移行元: 【行動】作成・編集時 ワークフロールール ワークフロールールの説明: "

formulas.name: UpdateJU_VisitCountFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( OR( MONTH(today())>=7 && YEAR($Record.ActivityDate)= YEAR(today()) && MONTH($Record.ActivityDate)>=7, MONTH(today())>=7 && YEAR($Record.ActivityDate)=YEAR(today())+1 && MONTH($Record.ActivityDate)<=6, MONTH(today())<=6 && YEAR($Record.ActivityDate)=YEAR(today())-1 && MONTH($Record.ActivityDate)>=7, MONTH(today())<=6 && YEAR($Record.ActivityDate)=YEAR(today()),MONTH($Record.ActivityDate)<=6 ), OR(TEXT( $Record.Type )="WEB面談",TEXT( $Record.Type )="訪問")), 1,0)

Flow.label: 【行動】作成・編集時_4

recordUpdates.description: 種別がWEB面談・訪問の場合はカウント1をセット
recordUpdates.name: mainUpdate
recordUpdates.label: mainUpdate
